title: Design Pack tokens (tokens.json)
description: The exact design tokens the Composer authors against: color palette, type role map, motion grammar, and the procedural textures the pack provides.

colors.description: name -> CSS color. Names become --<name> custom properties in base.css.

type.description: role -> { font, weight }. Roles are author-facing (hero/slab/mono/body/signature).

eases.description: the allowed GSAP eases for this pack (deterministic, seek-safe).

budget.description: motion budget guardrails the Composer + review loop respect.

transition_overlap_sec.description: [min,max] seam overlap so no static frame sits between scenes.

alive_always_on.description: require always-on texture motion across the whole runtime.

textures.description: procedural texture/filter ids the pack defines in partials/filters.html (e.g. halftone, spray-rough, grain).
